case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. CARLOS ALEXANDER PEREZ AGUILAR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO SEP-21-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER PEREZ AGUILAR IS PRESENT. BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT REQUEST SPANISH INTERPRETERS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE DUE TO UNAVAILABILITY OF SPANISH-LANGUAGE INTERPRETERS FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ AGUILAR, CARLOS ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO UNAVAILABILITY OF SPANISH-LANGUAGE INTERPRETERS FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT TO OCT-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT CARLOS ALEXANDER PEREZ AGUILAR IS PRESENT. THERE ARE NO SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETERS AVAILABLE TO ASSIST PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS ALEXANDER PEREZ AGUILAR IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ (#301545). NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED AUG-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ AGUILAR, CARLOS ALEXANDER
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES REQUESTING TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
